title: Creative Firework Tools
description: Adds A set of commands for level Admins or Creative mode players to create custom fireworks with ease
body:
# Creative Firework Tools Version 2.0.0 #

welcome to creative firework tools, this mod overhauls the built-in vanilla fireworks with the use of commands to allow players to expand their selection. With a brand new mode added to the barrage block and a random firework creator let the randomness go wild.

## Sick of the default 16 colors, We were ##

So we decided by using our commands to ditch the whole limited colors. Now you can have any color thanks to our RGB supported commands.

## Stars too limited for your liking, We know that feeling ##

And once again by using our commands you can have more stars per rocket also no limit on how many colors used, even better still is you can still use shapes with stars that have 8 or more colors. (Please keep in mind that excessive stars may have a significant impact on your games performance)

## Default shapes only, No chance ##

We have added in 3 new shapes just for fun, with more to follow later. We have Triangle, Square and Diamond.

### Crafting Recipes for new shapes ###

The commands are still required, however we have now added a mechanism to allow survival players to obtain the custom fireworks.
there are 3 main ingredients.
* Paper
* Gunpowder
* White dye
